prompts: Cinematic wide shot in a warm Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge. Yuna Dawncrest, a masculine mage in layered blue robes, steadies a dented metal shield on a wooden workbench. Yuna Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf, uses a small repair tool to carefully smooth the metal. Focused, cooperative atmosphere, warm ambient lighting, no text, no watermark.

Continuous shot from the same angle in the forge. Yuna Ashbell taps the final repair mark on the shield with her tool, signaling completion, while Yuna Dawncrest maintains a steady grip on the shield. Both characters share a brief, friendly nod of successful teamwork. Warm forge light, high detail, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
